message:
fix: prevent cpuset overflow and track FD truncation

- Fix integer overflow in count_cpus when parsing inverted ranges (e.g., "5-2")
  by adding bounds check (e >= s) before subtraction
- Add truncated field to FdInfo to track when FD inspection hits limit
- Handle truncated FD case in impact scorer with proper missing data tracking
- Export parse_fd_dir for external use
- Add comprehensive tests for cpuset parsing edge cases

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
